response.original_title: Koala Smart Tacking Point Public School Submission
response.overview: This short film follows a group of Year 5/6 students who discover a way to travel back in time. When they learn that koalas are facing extinction due to deforestation and cars destroying their habitat, they decide to use their time-travel opportunity to try and save them.  The story ends with a powerful message about responsibility and conservation, reminding viewers that the survival of koalas depends on the choices people make now. The film captures both the beauty of Australia’s wildlife and the heartbreaking reality that, without action, koalas could disappear forever.
response.title: Koala Smart Tacking Point Public School Submission
